claimText: The United Nations Forum on Forests (UNFF) was established by the UN Economic and Social Council (ECOSOC) in 2000.
evidenceExcerpt: Established by UN Economic and Social Council of the United Nations (ECOSOC) Resolution 2000/35.
examUse: Statement-based question on the origin and parent body of UNFF.

claimText: The third United Nations Ocean Conference (UNOC3) was held in Nice, France, and co-hosted by France and Costa Rica.
evidenceExcerpt: The third United Nations Ocean Conference (UNOC3) held in Nice, France and co-hosted by France and Costa Rica
examUse: Factual statement in a multiple-statement question regarding recent environmental conferences.

claimText: The third United Nations Ocean Conference (UNOC3) concluded with the adoption of the Nice Ocean Action Plan, which supports the creation of the International Panel for Ocean Sustainability (IPOS).
evidenceExcerpt: concluded with the adoption of the Nice Ocean Action Plan. Priorities include... supporting the creation of the International Panel for Ocean Sustainability (IPOS).
examUse: Correct-pair question matching conferences to their outcome documents or proposed institutions.
distractorHooks: IPOS created by the High Seas Treaty

claimText: Priorities of the third United Nations Ocean Conference (UNOC3) include implementing the High Seas Treaty (BBNJ Agreement) and scaling funding for SDG 14 (Life below water).
evidenceExcerpt: Priorities include implementing the High Seas Treaty (BBNJ Agreement), scaling up funding for SDG 14
examUse: Statement-based question on the objectives and focus areas of UNOC3.
distractorHooks: BBNJ Agreement is a priority of UNFF
